MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAP, INC.'S erroneously sued as DAP PRODUCTS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltfs & opposing parties; Todd Thacker, Esq. of Jackson & Wallace LLP 982-6300 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion for summary judgment denied. Triable issue of fact raised regarding exposure. (Plaintiff's declaration, Ay declaration, Defendant's answers to interrogatories.) Defendant's objection to plaintiff's declaration overruled. Plaintiff's objections to Treat declaration sustained as to paragraphs 5, 9, and 10, remaining objections overruled. Plaintiff to submit proposed form of order.
